notes:
### 会话管理 / Session Management
- IM 风格扁平化会话列表，支持按项目/日期/标签三种分组模式
  IM-style flat session list with three grouping modes: by project, date, or tag
- 多会话并行管理，独立终端保持，切换不中断
  Parallel multi-session management with independent terminal persistence, seamless switching
- 会话状态实时追踪：工作中、新消息、闲置、休眠、僵尸
  Real-time session status tracking: active, new messages, idle, sleeping, zombie
- 批量选择模式：批量关闭、删除、标记已读
  Batch selection mode: batch close, delete, mark as read
- 活动会话置顶，窗口聚焦自动同步外部新建的会话
  Active sessions pinned to top, auto-sync externally created sessions on window focus
- 单实例检测，重复启动时激活已有窗口
  Single instance detection, activates existing window on duplicate launch

### 终端集成 / Terminal Integration
- 基于 xterm.js 的内嵌终端，scrollback 50000 行
  Embedded terminal powered by xterm.js, 50,000-line scrollback buffer
- 附加终端：独立开启 Shell，持久化与休眠唤醒
  Additional terminals: independent shell instances, persistence and wake-from-sleep
- 终端快捷键自定义
  Customizable terminal keyboard shortcuts

### 消息编辑器 / Message Editor
- 文件/终端引用标签，可拖放插入
  File and terminal reference tags, drag-and-drop insertion
- 收藏夹和快捷文本片段
  Favorites and quick text snippets
- 快捷命令编辑器
  Quick command editor
- 草稿自动保存与恢复
  Auto-save and restore drafts
- 历史消息侧边栏
  History message sidebar

### 会话信息 / Session Info
- 卡片显示模型标签、上下文使用百分比
  Card display with model label and context usage percentage
- 悬浮详情卡片
  Hover detail card
- 右键菜单：切换模型、跳转分组、复制 ID
  Context menu: switch model, jump to group, copy ID

### 主题与外观 / Theme & Appearance
- 深色/浅色/跟随系统
  Dark/Light/System-follow theme
- 自定义标题栏
  Custom title bar
- 任务栏图标闪动提醒
  Taskbar icon flash notification
- 左侧导航栏
  Left navigation sidebar

### 设置 / Settings
- Debug/Release 数据目录隔离
  Isolated data directories for Debug/Release builds
- 回收站：软删除、恢复、彻底删除
  Trash: soft delete, restore, permanent delete
- 导出/导入配置
  Export/import configuration
- 启动时检查更新
  Check for updates on startup

### 系统 / System
- Windows Job Object 进程树管理
  Windows Job Object process tree management
- 三层 conhost 孤儿进程清理
  Three-layer conhost orphan process cleanup
- 窗口位置持久化 + 多屏边界校验
  Window position persistence with multi-monitor boundary validation
- 支持最小化到托盘
  Minimize to system tray support

### 在线更新 / Online Update
- 检查更新（Gitee + jsDelivr CDN + GitHub 三层端点）
  Check for updates (triple endpoint: Gitee + jsDelivr CDN + GitHub)
- 下载更新（MSI 安装包，进度回调）
  Download updates (MSI installer with progress callback)
- 下载完成后确认重启安装
  Confirm restart and install after download completes
- 启动时自动检查（可在设置中关闭）
  Auto-check on startup (configurable in settings)
